recommendations.title: Breakin'
recommendations.overview: A struggling young dancer joins forces with two breakdancers and together they become a street sensation.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.

recommendations.title: The Company
recommendations.overview: Ensemble drama centered around a group of ballet dancers, with a focus on one young dancer who's poised to become a principal performer.

recommendations.title: You Got Served
recommendations.overview: At Mr. Rad's Warehouse, the best hip-hop crews in Los Angeles compete for money and respect. But when a suburban crew crashes the party, stealing their dancers — and their moves — two warring friends have to pull together to represent the street.

recommendations.title: Feel the Beat
recommendations.overview: After failing to make it on Broadway, April returns to her hometown and reluctantly begins training a misfit group of young dancers for a competition.

recommendations.title: Battle of the Year
recommendations.overview: A down-on-his-luck coach is hired to prepare a team of the best American dancers for an international tournament that attracts all the best crews from around the world, but the Americans haven't won in fifteen years.

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.

recommendations.title: Step Up 3D
recommendations.overview: A tight-knit group of New York City street dancers, including Luke and Natalie, team up with NYU freshman Moose, and find themselves pitted against the world's best hip-hop dancers in a high-stakes showdown that will change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Step Up 2: The Streets
recommendations.overview: When rebellious street dancer Andie West lands at the elite Maryland School of the Arts, she finds herself fighting to fit in while also trying to hold onto her old life. When she joins forces with the school's hottest dancer, Chase Collins, to form

recommendations.title: Into the Beat
